---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| cache: false

# ── Read optional metadata ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
yml_path <- "paintings.yml"
meta_map  <- list()
if (file.exists(yml_path)) {
  raw <- yaml::read_yaml(yml_path)
  for (entry in raw) {
    if (!is.null(entry$file)) meta_map[[tolower(entry$file)]] <- entry  # ← tolower
  }
}

# ── Scan images folder ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# All images physically present in the folder
all_imgs <- list.files(
  "images/paintings",
  pattern     = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp)$",
  full.names  = FALSE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Build ordered list: YAML order first, then unlisted images appended
yml_files <- vapply(raw, function(e) e$file, character(1))
yml_files <- yml_files[tolower(yml_files) %in% tolower(all_imgs)]  # only keep ones that exist
rest      <- all_imgs[!tolower(all_imgs) %in% tolower(yml_files)]  # unlisted images
imgs      <- c(yml_files, rest)

# ── Build JSON string (no external packages needed) ───────────────────────────
esc_json <- function(s) {
  s <- as.character(s)
  s <- gsub("\\\\", "\\\\\\\\", s)   # escape backslashes first
  s <- gsub('"',    '\\\\"',    s)   # escape double quotes
  s
}

if (length(imgs) == 0) {
  # Output a plain HTML placeholder — a single self-contained tag, no open divs
  cat('<p id="gallery-empty" style="padding:4rem 2rem;text-align:center;color:#888;font-size:.9rem;">',
      'Add images to <code>images/paintings/</code> and re-render.',
      '</p>')
} else {
  # Build JSON array of painting objects
  entries <- vapply(imgs, function(img) {
    m      <- meta_map[[tolower(img)]]
    title  <- esc_json(if (!is.null(m$title))  m$title                else tools::file_path_sans_ext(img))
    year   <- esc_json(if (!is.null(m$year))   as.character(m$year)   else "")
    medium <- esc_json(if (!is.null(m$medium)) m$medium               else "")
    format <- esc_json(if (!is.null(m$format)) m$format else "")
    group  <- esc_json(if (!is.null(m$group))  m$group  else "default")
    sprintf('{"file":"%s","title":"%s","year":"%s","medium":"%s","format":"%s","group":"%s"}',
        esc_json(img), title, year, medium, format, group)
  }, character(1))

  json <- paste0("[", paste(entries, collapse = ","), "]")

  # Two self-contained HTML elements (no unclosed divs for pandoc to worry about)
  cat('<div id="gallery-root"></div>')
  cat(sprintf('<script>window.__paintings = %s;</script>', json))
}
```
